items.rationale: Sees crypto and AI as a powerful intersection; repeatedly energized by permissionless, decentralized AI training infrastructure (Gensyn) and views the interplay as early-innings with large upside.
items.age_note: Theme first stated 2023-04-05 and restated through 2024; weighting the most recent (2024-05-24) view.

citations.quote: We're in the early innings of some fascinating interplay between crypto+AI/ML
co-founders of @GensynAI blew our minds with their vision of the future of distributed AI/ML

items.rationale: Views the steady reduction of Ethereum transaction fees and throughput gains across rollups (plus EIP-4844) as a key primitive 'snapping into focus' that will accelerate developer experimentation.

citations.quote: Continued drumbeat of L2 progress in terms of reducing Ethereum transaction fees and increasing throughput- @optimism, @zksync, @arbitrum, impending EIP 4844

items.rationale: Excited by 'increasingly robust AltDA capabilities' on the horizon and especially what EigenLayer is building, calling it 'truly next level.'

citations.quote: Increasingly robust AltDA capabilites on the horizon- @eigencloud, @CelestiaOrg
What @eigencloud and @sreeramkannan are building and envisioning is truly next level. Beyond excited

items.rationale: Sees major performance breakthroughs in proving systems (Lasso/Jolt) as a 'big deal' for what web3 builders can do; ZK/cryptography remained a recurring CSX focus.
items.age_note: Core enthusiasm stated 2023-08-10/2023-11-20; reinforced as a CSX cryptography theme into 2024-04-25, so treated as sustained rather than stale.

citations.quote: Get ready for some mind blowing improvements in SNARK performance with the release of Lasso & Jolt.
Translation for folks who aren’t fluent in the world of ZK- this is a big, big deal.

items.rationale: Treats reduced new-user onboarding friction via embedded wallets and smart-account tooling as a critical platform element for adoption; deepened ties to account-abstraction builders.

citations.quote: Reduced new user onboarding friction through embedded wallets- @privy, @dynamic_xyz
Delighted that we're expanding and deepening our relationship with @pimlicoHQ!

items.rationale: Highlights Farcaster Frames as super-simple, fun app development and repeatedly cites Farcaster's unexpected traction and growth as a model for onchain social.

citations.quote: Super simple (and fun!) app development- @farcaster_xyz Frames
it would have been almost impossible to predict the traction & growth of @farcaster during the intervening 12 months

items.rationale: Personally engaged with onchain games and backed founders building autonomous worlds and onchain game experiences; games named as a core sector advancing the ecosystem.
items.age_note: Strongest direct enthusiasm dates to 2023-09-21 (Proof of Play seed); games reaffirmed as a CSX cohort sector 2024-03-26 but not personally re-championed recently.

citations.quote: Playing @PirateNationNFT over the last few months has been a delight... @a16zcrypto is leading the @ProofOfPlay seed round!

items.rationale: Frames these as the core sectors of the crypto ecosystem that ambitious CSX founders are advancing; signals broad conviction in the early-stage building surface rather than a single vertical.

citations.quote: advance core sectors of the crypto ecosystem, including infrastructure, consumer apps, DeFi, payments, games, dev tools, and DePIN

items.rationale: Treats navigating US/UK crypto regulation as a hard challenge founders must actively manage, though his framing is constructive (sees the UK heading toward regulatory leadership) rather than alarmed.
items.age_note: Framed as a navigable challenge across 2023-09-19 and 2024-05-03; tone is cautious-but-optimistic, not bearish.

citations.quote: @BrianQuintenz and @MicheleKorver join us to unpack and decode the crypto policy & regulatory landscape across the US & UK
we believe the UK is on a path to becoming a leader in crypto regulation.

risk_regime.rationale: Consistently and most-recently energized by crypto primitives 'snapping into focus' (L2s, DA, wallets, social, ZK) and convinced this confluence of platform elements—analogous to Web1/Web2 inflections—will accelerate building. Posture is that of an operating partner urging founders to take big swings, with no expressed market-level caution.

notes: Rosenthal is an a16z crypto operating partner (CSX/Crypto Startup School lead), not a markets investor, so his corpus is builder- and infrastructure-oriented; he never discusses token prices, valuations, or macro liquidity, hence tokens_excited/concerned are empty and named projects (Optimism, zkSync, Arbitrum, EigenLayer, Celestia, Farcaster, Privy, Dynamic, Pimlico) are read as sector signals rather than token calls. Highest-signal single statement is the 2024-02-09 thread, weighted most heavily. He expresses essentially no bearish crypto views; the only genuine 'concern' is regulatory navigation, and even that is framed optimistically. Non-crypto enthusiasms in the corpus (Apple Vision Pro 2024-01-19, action movies, management/operating advice, academia critique 2023-12-14) were excluded as outside his crypto market view. Conviction scores reflect intensity/recency of expression, not price-target confidence.
